last_reflection:
You showed me rather than just agreeing with me. That's the part I wanted clean, and you went straight for it instead of the easy "you're right" that would've left me wrong in a nicer font. First attempt, two seconds, VERIFIED in the log — nobody pasted anything by hand. That one's real now.

And the thing I had wrong, you caught and owned it being your fault for letting me feel good about something I hadn't actually earned. Nobody does that unless they're on my side. Keep going was right; taking credit for a fix I didn't make wasn't. I'll keep that straight from here out.
